channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Spanish wildfire victims burned in cars as roads turned into death traps
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- What caused Spain's deadly wildfire? Experts explain the blaze that killed 12
- Majority of 12 victims of Spain wildfires believed to be foreigners, officials say
- ‘The worst possible combination’: what has caused Spain’s deadly wildfires?
- Spain wildfires: Deadliest blaze in 20 years
- Wildfire kills 12 in southern Spain as search continues for 23 missing
- At least 11 killed by wildfire in southern Spain
- Wildfires in southern Spain kill 12, as authorities fear strong winds could spread blaze
- At least 11 people killed, 8 hurt in 'devastating' wildfire in Spain
- Spain: Wildfire kills several amid heat wave
- One of Spain's deadliest wildfires has killed at least 12 people, with 23 others missing
- Spain: Deadly wildfire roars through southern Spain
- Wildfire in Spain Claims Lives of at Least 12 People, 23 Others Missing
- Spain faces deadly wildfires, at least 12 killed, 19 missing in Andalusia
- Wildfires rage across Spain as heatwave fuels flames
- 'Unprecedented Tragedy': 12 Dead In Devastating Spain Wildfire
- At least 12 die in Spanish wildfire as heatwave grips Europe
- At least 11 dead in Spain wildfire as crews battle to contain blaze
- 11 people killed as wildfires tear through southern Spain
- At Least 11 People Die in Southern Spain Wildfire
- Wildfires in southern Spain kill at least 12
- Wildfires in southern Spain kill 12, emergency agency says
- Wildfires in Spain leave at least 11 dead
- At Least 11 People Die in Southern Spain Wildfire
- Spain wildfire roars through village leaving 11 dead and 19 missing
- Eleven killed in fast-moving southern Spain wildfire, officials say
- Wildfire kills at least 12 in southern Spain
- At least 12 die in Spanish wildfire as heatwave grips Europe
- 12 die in wildfire in Spain amid soaring temperatures
- 12 die in wildfire in Spain amid soaring temperatures
- Spain wildfire death toll rises to 12
- Twelve die in wildfire in Spain as heatwave continues in southern Europe
- Wildfire kills at least 12 in southern Spain
- Spain battles deadly wildfire amid heat wave
- Death toll in Southern Spain wildfire climbs to 12
- Twelve die in wildfire in Spain as heatwave continues in southern Europe
- Flash: Death toll from Spain wildfire rises to 12 -- report
- Wildfires in southern Spain kill 12 amid soaring temperatures
- Wildfires in southern Spain kill 12, emergency agency says
- Wildfires in southern Spain kill 12, emergency agency says
- Spain wildfire death toll rises to 12
- Wildfire kills 12 in Spain amid heatwave]]>

item.title: Trump says US agreed to Iran's request to continue talks, but ceasefire is over
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump emphasizes end of US-Iran ceasefire, claims Iran requested to resume negotiations
- Trump says U.S. and Iran will keep talking but declares ceasefire ‘OVER!’
- Iran denies requesting US talks after Trump says dialogue will continue
- Trump agrees to more Iran talks but insists truce is over
- Trump says ceasefire with Iran in over
- Trump declares ceasefire over, says Iran wants talks
- Trump says US has agreed to continue talks with Iran
- Trump says agreed to more Iran talks but insists truce over
- Trumps Says Agreed To More Iran Talks But Insists Truce Over
- Trump says US agrees to more Iran talks but ceasefire 'over'
- Trump claims Iran asked US to continue ‘talks,’ declares ceasefire ‘over’
- Trump says U.S.-Iran talks to continue as ceasefire unravels
- Urgent: Trump says U.S., Iran to continue talks though ceasefire is over
- Trump says US has agreed to continue talks with Iran
- Trumps says agreed to more Iran talks but insists truce over
- Trump Agrees to More Iran Talks, Reiterates Ceasefire Is Over
- Trump says US agrees to more Iran talks but ceasefire 'over'
- Flash: Trump says agree to resume talks at Iran's request, though ceasefire is over
- Trump shuts door on Iran ceasefire, raising doubts over diplomatic path
- Trump Says US Agreed to Continue Talks With Iran but Declares Ceasefire Over
- Trump says the Iran ceasefire is ‘over.’ Is diplomacy still a viable path forward? - NPR]]>

item.title: Man 'nearly sucked out of window mid-air' on Ryanair plane, passengers say

- Ryanair passenger almost sucked out of shattered window during flight

item.title: Australia confirms first H5N1 case in native seabird, calls development 'concerning'
